programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the north Norfolk coast through one of the least developed spots in Britain, finding out how the area maintained its rural, remote identity despite the dynamic industrial changes of the Victorian age. From the arrival of Bertie, Prince of Wales at Sandringham House to the opening of Cromer Pier, Tony's four-day walk sees him learn about key periods in the county's history. He explores prime shooting estates, purpose-built seaside resorts, salt marshes and disused railway lines as he discovers how powerful landowners were able to control development and even shape the railways to suit their needs(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston looks at the life and work of Serbian inventor Nikola Tesla, investigating conspiracy theories that the scientific establishment and national governments covered up his work on energy sources. Cameras follow the twists and turns of the investigation as detectives try to uncover what really happened to him(n)

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The 18 remaining recruits enter the third phase of this condensed version of the SAS selection process. programme.title: Naked Attraction

programme.title: Meat the Family

Meanwhile, there are new arrivals for Pam, Lou, Jade and Jazmyn, who are responsible for rearing two lambs. programme.title: How to Steal Pigs and Influence People

They enjoy hundreds of thousands of followers and know exactly what it takes to make an impact online(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra runs for school president, but Ray decides to vote against her to avoid looking after the twins during all the meetings she would have to attend. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton(n)

programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. They found that Ben Field, a would-be vicar and academic, had recently become part of both of their lives and benefited from their wills. This programme shows that by delving back in time through friends' and loved ones' memories of Peter and Ben's relationship, as well as Peter's diary, the police discovered a story of love and betrayal(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays(n)

Despite their prognosis and the fact that another patient is awaiting his attention, House insists on treating the prisoner. Medical drama, with Hugh Laurie and guest star LL Cool J(n)

programme.title: House

programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of unemployed people visits Hull, which has one of the highest unemployment rates and lowest average weekly wages in the UK. Rebecca is 16 and expecting her first baby with 17-year-old boyfriend Sonny, who is adamant he will be in work by the time the child arrives, while her foster mother Anita is concerned she will be unable to afford her house when her children move out. Gordon has not worked in decades and has very strong political views as to why employment has eluded him and many others in the north of England(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: A single father with six children cannot afford to both feed his family and heat their home, while a man who was seriously injured in a car accident more than 10 years ago struggles to prove to the authorities that he is unable to work, and a woman setting up a fortune telling business faces an uncertain future(n)

programme.title: Me & My 10 Kids: Mega Families
programme.desc: On a remote seaside village on the coast of Scotland live the Sullivans and their clan of ten. Today is back to school which means running a tight ship to get lunches ready so mum and Dad divide and conquer. Mum takes on bathroom duty upstairs whilst Dad inspects the troops as they head out of the door. By 8:30 mum Emma already feels like she's had a packed day! In Whitstable, Kent the Gale family and their ten kids are proving to be the most popular family on the street when they decide to put up their very own inflatable castle. But it soon descends into chaos as kids and adults get stuck in! In Southampton lives single-mum Sonya and her mega-brood of ten kids. To ease the pressure on her workload Sonya is passing on her culinary skills to eldest daughter Shannon but despite the 17 year old's attempts to stick to the recipe even the delights of a spag bol is not going to keep all of the troops happy. And in Wales the Holloway-Scotts and their ten kids have to prepare for Olivia's pro(n)

Fantasy thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Amber Heard and William Fichtner(n)

First episode of the detective series, starring Peter Falk and Gene Barry(n)

Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and George Hamilton(n)

When attempts are made on the lives of Gibbs and Tony, it appears that all of the NCIS agents are in mortal danger. Starring Mark Harmon and Colin Hanks(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sarah Porter, the new Secretary of the Navy, charges Gibbs and the team with finding terrorist group the Brotherhood of Doubt, which was responsible for killing her predecessor. She expects the group's next target to be billionaire Tomas Mendez, who spends his money trying to defeat terrorism, but whose motives may not be entirely altruistic. Meanwhile, Tony flies to Tel Aviv, where new Mossad director Orli Elbaz reveals they have a report of a possible sighting of Ziva at a kibbutz she went to as a child. Crime drama, guest starring Marina Sirtis(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Drama, starring Christopher Meloni(n)

Crime drama, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

Crime drama, guest starring Antonio Sabato Jr, with Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is convinced that a woman's apparent suicide is a cover-up for murder, ending a three-year quest to trace her missing twin brother. The detective hurries to compile enough evidence to prove her instincts right and is nearly killed by the victim's stepfather - but with the culprit in custody, she hopes to find out more about the long-lost sibling. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A prisoner requests Hawkes' presence at his execution, and makes a confession that shocks the forensic scientist. However, just as the lethal injection is about to be administered, a guard drops dead - and a riot ensues that brings Hawkes face to face with one of his old enemies. Gary Sinise stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A notorious drug dealer is murdered and suspicion falls on two possible culprits - a priest with a reputation as a vigilante, and the father of a teenager who died of an overdose. Briscoe and Green attempt to discover whether either of them took the law into his own hands. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an apartment block resident prompts Briscoe and Green to investigate her long-standing battle with the landlord in the hope of finding a credible suspect. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate a state senator suspected of involvement in the disappearance of one of his aides. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe the fatal stabbing of psychologist Tracy Conley may be linked to confidential client information on her computer. They learn one of the files on her hard drive has been tampered with since her death - information that would have ensured a known rapist spends another five years behind bars. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the beating and rape of an Afghan woman in Central Park. As it probes the violent and disturbing case, the victim's family turn their backs on her. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson get mixed up in the murky world of politics after a coalition leader's gay son is found murdered on the roof of his apartment. The finger of suspicion points to a notorious rapist, who has just been released from prison on parole, but he insists he didn't commit the crime - so further DNA tests are used to shed light on the death. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector

She is not impressed by owners Lynn and Ziggy's self-decorated bedrooms and the condition of their indoor swimming pool, and decides they need a serious wake-up call if they are to operate at a profit(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team head to Littlehampton in West Sussex, where a man spent his life savings on home improvements so his sons could visit him but became depressed when rogue builders left the house in a wreck. Local trades, family and friends join the renovators to spend nine days transforming the damp property into a home fit for the future(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Children in Need special from 2011. Nick Knowles and his team enlist the help of the construction trade and the local community to renovate the Norris Green Youth Centre in Liverpool, a building that provides activities for youngsters with few other leisure options outside school(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: As part of the 2013 appeal, Nick Knowles and the team head to Peterborough to help Children in Need-funded organisation Little Miracles, which supports youngsters with disabilities and life-limiting illnesses and their families. However, whereas Mark, Chris, Julian and Billy normally renovate an existing property, for the first time they are knocking down a building and reconstructing it from the ground up - making it worth almost £1million. With just nine days to complete the job, they'll need help - and lots of it. Luckily, tradespeople turn out in force - from both the local area and across the country - giving their time for free(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Real Crime
programme.desc: The five-and-a-half-year investigation into the rape and murder of Southampton teenager Hannah Foster in 2003. After fleeing the country, Maninder Pal Singh Kohli confessed to the crime live on Indian TV, and despite a retraction and efforts to stop himself facing justice in the British courts, in 2008 he became the first Indian national to be extradited back to the UK. Featuring interviews, archive footage and dramatic reconstruction(n)

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Series recreating the court cases of three of the Second World War's most notorious Nazis, using eyewitness interviews and archive footage, as well as considering the interviews they underwent at the hands of lawyers and psychologists. The first episode focuses on the trial of Albert Speer, Hitler's chief architect and armaments minister, regarded by many as a 'good' Nazi. Nathaniel Parker stars(n)

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Members of the British Resistance Movement recall 'the most vivid days' of their lives and Peter Williams tells the story of the Werewolves, the Nazi fanatics who tried to form a German underground resistance(n)

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's V1 flying bombs were responsible for the deaths of nearly 6,000 people in London and the South of England. This episode features accounts from the men and women whose job was to fight the V1s from the ground and a report on the impact of a bomb that hit a chapel one Sunday morning, killing 121 people(n)

programme.title: Supersonic Saucer (1956)
programme.desc: A group of children help protect a stranded alien from criminals who want to exploit his strange powers. Sci-fi adventure, starring Marcia Manolescue and Gillian Harrison(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay(n)

programme.title: May to December
programme.desc: Alec weighs up the pros and cons of moving into Zoe's flat(n)

programme.title: May to December
programme.desc: Alec moves into Zoe's flat with a framed picture of his idol Perry Mason(n)

programme.title: The Only Way (1970)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama, set in occupied Denmark and telling the story of a heroic effort to smuggle 7,000 Jews over the border into Sweden so they might escape the Holocaust. Starring Ove Sprogoe and Jane Seymour(n)

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread (1991)
programme.desc: A wealthy widow travels to Italy to escape the pressure of her in-laws, and promptly falls in love with a poor local. When the revived woman agrees to marry her foreign friend, her relatives back home are shocked by the apparent disregard for class, culture and their family's image, and set about putting an end to the unlikely union. Period drama, based on the novel by EM Forster, starring Helena Bonham Carter, Judy Davis and Rupert Graves(n)

programme.title: Anthea Turner's Hot Topics
programme.desc: The presenter reports on the danger of air pollution, new treatments for cancer, and the reliability of self-driving cars(n)

programme.title: London Live Book Club
programme.desc: Not sure what to read next? We offer inspiration as we chat to London-based writers, and those who feature the capital in their works(n)

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events, showcasing London's vibrant culture scene(n)

programme.title: Henry VIII: The Mind of a Tyrant
programme.desc: David Starkey examines how the Tudor king went from being a handsome young prince whose ascension to the throne in 1509 filled the nation with hope to a ruthless monarch(n)

programme.title: Meet the Lords
programme.desc: The Government threatens to trim the Lords' powers if they rebel again and Lord Strathclyde publishes his review into the powers the upper house have to block legislation. Cameras follow Labour peer Alf Dubs as he attempts to push through an amendment to the Immigration Bill to allow unaccompanied refugee children into the country, while Admiral Alan West isn't happy about a public poll that has voted overwhelmingly to name a new polar research ship Boaty McBoatface and raises a question about it(n)

programme.title: London Real
programme.desc: Brian Rose is in debate with some of the world's most interesting minds and controversial figures. Mimi Ikonn discusses how to design and manifest your dream life(n)

programme.title: Orphans of Isis
programme.desc: Karen Nettleton has spent five years trying to rescue her grandchildren and great-grandchildren from Syria. With their jihadist parents dead, they are stuck in a refugee camp(n)

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot offers his body and Gary fixes up a burglar alarm in forlorn efforts to impress Deborah(n)

programme.title: Hot Property (2016)
programme.desc: A corporate spy loses her job after getting caught embezzling, and is no longer able to fund her lavish lifestyle. Faced with being evicted from her rented home, she puts all her skills of deception into fending off the landlord, replacement tenants and a psychotic estate agent. Comedy, starring MyAnna Buring and Tom Rhys Harries(n)

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The tourists arrive in the Spanish city of Almeria where another couple join the group. The contestants enjoy an archery lesson and also learn about the traditional art of rug-making, before things become heated at the vote(n)

programme.desc: News and events from across London from the past few days(n)

programme.desc: The girls attend a roller-skating contest, and investigate when someone seems to be sabotaging the competition(n)

programme.title: K3

programme.title: Vic the Viking

programme.title: Meet the Lords
programme.desc: The Government threatens to trim the Lords' powers if they rebel again and Lord Strathclyde publishes his review into the powers the upper house have to block legislation. Cameras follow Labour peer Alf Dubs as he attempts to push through an amendment to the Immigration Bill to allow unaccompanied refugee children into the country, while Admiral Alan West isn't happy about a public poll that has voted overwhelmingly to name a new polar research ship Boaty McBoatface and raises a question about it(n)

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Dramatisation of the trial of Luftwaffe chief and designated successor to Hitler, Hermann Goering. The larger-than-life character was renowned for his charisma and flamboyance, but also as one of the most unrepentant and ruthless of all Nazis. Having aimed to use the courtroom as a means of rehabilitating the fascist regime, it was only at a late stage that he was forced to concede defeat. Robert Pugh stars(n)

Prison drama, starring Iain Glen and Robert Carlyle(n)

Period drama, based on the novel by EM Forster, starring Helena Bonham Carter, Judy Davis and Rupert Graves(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Twelve months with the staff and patients of one of Britain's leading cancer hospitals, the Royal Marsden in London. The film follows Rosemary, Phil and Ray as they undergo remarkable new treatments - including a multimillion-pound genetically targeted drug to fight skin cancer and advanced robotic surgery - and reveals the medical breakthroughs that are offering new hope in defeating a disease that more than one in three people will develop at some stage(n)

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Documentary investigating allegations that a lack of proper controls is allowing financial, physical and even sexual abuse to take place within Britain's mosques. programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)
